growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: WCA (Wilkins-Chalgren Anaerobe broth, Oxoid CM0643) with supplemental mucin (Sigma M1778, type III)

up.method: better growth (faster outgrowth / higher yield) with mucin; mucin-CAZyme genes upregulated by RNA-seq

growth_records.cite: Ducarmon et al. Cayman enables large-scale analysis of gut microbiome carbohydrate-active enzyme repertoires. Nat Microbiol (2026). DOI:10.1038/s41564-026-02318-2. [PMC13236585]
growth_records.snippet: Growth curves of E. tayi and H. hathewayi in rich medium (WCA) either with or without supplemental mucin ... media-corrected OD (578 nm, log scale, three replicates) ... We observed better growth (faster outgrowth, increased growth rates an
growth_records.notes: Growth measured only as OD578 growth curves (Fig.3b, log scale); no numeric growth rate, doubling time or flux reported in text or tables (values are figure-only). Grew to higher yield in WCA with mucin. WCA is a commercial undefined broth (Oxoid CM0643) so composition not stated. Record captures the condition; no quantitative rate derivable.

phenotypes.base_medium: Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 24120 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/24120
